name: Butterfinger Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cracker crumbs and butter. Press 2/3 of the mixture into the bottom of a 9 x 13 pan.
2. Prepare the puddings using only 2 cups of milk. Blend in the softened vanilla ice cream until smooth.
3. Pour the pudding mixture over the crumb layer in the pan.
4. Freeze the dessert until it is partly firm.
5. Remove from the freezer and cover with Cool Whip.
6. Crush the remaining Butterfingers candy bars and mix them with 1/3 cup of cracker crumbs.
7. Sprinkle the crushed candy on top of the Cool Whip.
8. Refrigerate for several hours before serving.
